rationale: The citing paper references Trusov et al. (2010) in the methods section to justify how it defines and selects Weibo influentials for the retweet treatment. This citation supports a concrete operational decision - using influence-related user attributes such as follower base and retweet activity - rather than serving only as general background. Even though it appears in a grouped citation, it has a clear functional role in treatment design.
relation_description: The citing study applies ideas from Trusov et al. (2010) on identifying influential users in social networks to its own influencer recruitment criteria in a Weibo field experiment.
